svg.style: position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;
svg.title: new2

div.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; display: flex; flex-direction: column; font-family: 'Comic Sans MS', sans-serif; box-sizing: border-box;

button.style: width: 100%; height: 100%; font-size: 16pt; font-family: 'Comic Sans MS', sans-serif;
